CustomField.description: Current number of working days past due
CustomField.formula: (5 * ( FLOOR( ( TODAY() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( TODAY() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - (5 * ( FLOOR( ( Last_Payment_Date__c - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7)) + MIN( 5, MOD( Last_Payment_Date__c - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE('2020-01-01'), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-01-01")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-02-17"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-02-17")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-04-10"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-04-10")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-05-18"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-05-18")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-07-01"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-07-01")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-08-03"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-08-03")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-09-07"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-09-07")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-10-12"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-10-12")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-11-11"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-11-11")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-12-25"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-12-25")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2020-12-28"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-12-28")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-01-01"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-01-01")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-02-15"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-02-15")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-04-02"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-04-02")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-04-05"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-04-05")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-05-24"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-05-24")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-07-01"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-07-01")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-08-02"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-08-02")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-09-06"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-09-06")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-10-11"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-10-11")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-11-11"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-11-11")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-12-27"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-12-27")),1,0) - IF(AND(Last_Payment_Date__c < DATEVALUE("2021-12-28"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-12-28")),1,0)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Current number of working days past due
CustomField.label: Days Delinquent
